Terms & Conditions

Last updated: April 2, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing this website, you agree to comply with these terms and all applicable laws. If you do not agree, please do not use this website.

2. Website Use

Content provided on this website is for general information about our services. You agree not to misuse the website, attempt unauthorized access, or disrupt normal operation.

3. Intellectual Property

All website content, including text, graphics, logos, and media, is owned by or licensed to Dwizzy Infra unless stated otherwise. Unauthorized use, copying, or redistribution is prohibited.

4. Service Information

Project timelines, capabilities, and service descriptions shown on the website are indicative and may change based on actual project scope, technical assessment, and agreement terms.

5. Limitation of Liability

Dwizzy Infra is not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of this website or reliance on its content.

6. Third-Party Links

This website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content, policies, or practices of external sites.

7. Changes to Terms

We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the website after updates means you accept the revised terms.

8. Contact

For questions about these terms, contact info@dwizzyinfra.com or call +91 9217762100.

Delivering excellence in infrastructure development with a focus on quality, safety, and precision. We are your trusted partner in complex projects.
